mapper.select: select d.id, d.name, d.cooking_method, d.ingredients, d.image_url, msp.dish_category as dish_type, d.meal_packages, d.sort, d.enabled, d.create_time, d.update_time from meal_schedule_plan msp join dish d on d.id = msp.dish_id where msp.enabled = 1 and d.enabled = 1 and msp.week_num = #{weekNum} and msp.day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek} and msp.meal_time = #{mealTime} order by d.sort asc, d.id asc

select msp.id, msp.week_num, msp.day_of_week, msp.meal_time, msp.dish_category, msp.dish_id, msp.enabled, msp.create_time, msp.update_time, d.id as dish_ref_id, d.name as dish_name, d.image_url as dish_image_url from meal_schedule_plan msp join dish d on d.id = msp.dish_id where msp.week_num = #{weekNum} order by msp.day_of_week asc, field(msp.meal_time, 'BREAKFAST', 'LUNCH', 'DINNER') asc, field(msp.dish_category, 'SOUP', 'MAIN', 'SIDE', 'VEGETABLE', 'RICE') asc, msp.id asc

select msp.id, msp.week_num, msp.day_of_week, msp.meal_time, msp.dish_category, msp.dish_id, msp.enabled, msp.create_time, msp.update_time from meal_schedule_plan msp where msp.week_num = #{weekNum} order by msp.id asc
